action.reasoning: Observation: cam_unet_v3 trained successfully for ~19.5 minutes and reached validation loss 0.070852, close to but slightly worse than the prior v2 best validation (~0.0703), so improvement is uncertain. Analysis: the highest-value action now is immediate hidden-set evaluation of the new checkpoint before spending more iterations; if it improves LPIPS we keep it, if not we revert to v2. Decision: submit checkpoints/cam_unet_v3.pt with the current predict.py now.
